changeSet.author: dev
changeSet.comment: Usuwa workout z 04.04.2026 dla usera kapiet (id=2), jeśli istnieje

delete.where: workout_id IN (SELECT id FROM workout WHERE workout_date = '2026-04-04' AND user_id = 2)

changeSet.author: dev
changeSet.comment: Kopiuje wszystkie workouty usera kapiet (id=2) do usera demo (id=1)
